description: Design System Component Library - Primitive components that compose together following design tokens

components.name: IconButton
components.description: Button containing only an icon, used for compact actions
components.usage: Used in chat header, toolbars, cards, tables

accessibility.keyboard: Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate

components.name: Button
components.description: Primary interactive element for user actions
components.usage: Primary actions, form submissions, modal confirmations

accessibility.keyboard: Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Auto-expanding multi-line text input

behavior.autoExpand: Grows from minRows to maxRows as user types
behavior.scrollInternal: Scrolls internally if content exceeds maxRows

components.usage: Chat input, comment forms, feedback forms

accessibility.label: Required via aria-label or label element
accessibility.errorMessage: Displayed below input with error icon

components.name: Dropdown
components.description: Select menu for choosing from multiple options
components.usage: Model selector in chat, filters, settings

components.name: SegmentedControl
components.description: Toggle between 2-5 mutually exclusive options
components.usage: Mode switcher (Planning/Building) in chat header

accessibility.keyboard: Arrow keys to navigate, Space/Enter to select

components.name: FileChip
components.description: Pill-shaped badge showing attached file with remove button

behavior.remove: Fades out with transition-fast on remove

components.usage: Attached files in chat input, file uploads, document lists

components.name: Accordion
components.description: Collapsible section with header and expandable content

behavior.icon: Chevron points right when collapsed, down when expanded

components.usage: AI message accordions (actions, files, results), FAQ sections, settings panels

components.name: CodeBlock
components.description: Code display with syntax highlighting and copy button

behavior.copyButton: Appears on hover, shows checkmark for 2s after copy
behavior.syntaxHighlight: Uses design system colors for highlighting

components.usage: AI messages with code, documentation, examples

components.name: Badge
components.description: Small status indicator or label
components.usage: Status indicators, labels, counters

accessibility.semanticMeaning: Color not sole indicator, includes icon/text

components.name: Modal
components.description: Dialog overlay for confirmations and focused interactions

behavior.backdrop: Fade in backdrop, scale up modal
behavior.scrollBehavior: Body scrolls if content exceeds viewport

components.usage: Confirmations (clear conversation), forms, alerts

components.name: TypingIndicator
components.description: Animated dots showing AI is typing

behavior.animation: 3 dots pulse in sequence, infinite loop, 1.4s cycle

components.usage: AI message area while waiting for response

components.name: Input
components.description: Enhanced text input with variants, states, icons, and validation

behavior.autoIcon: Automatically adds type-specific icons (search, email, tel, url)

components.usage: Form fields, login forms, search, settings

accessibility.label: Required via label prop or aria-label
accessibility.errorMessage: Displayed below input with error icon

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Custom checkbox with consistent styling and checkmark icon
components.usage: Form selections, filters, settings toggles, multi-select lists

components.name: Radio
components.description: Custom radio button with inner circle indicator
components.usage: Single selection from options, form radio groups, settings

accessibility.keyboard: Space/Enter to select, Arrow keys to navigate group

components.name: Toast
components.description: Notification component for user feedback with auto-dismiss

duration.description: Auto-dismiss duration in ms (0 = manual only)

behavior.animation: Slides in from right, fades out on dismiss

components.usage: Success confirmations, error alerts, warnings, info messages

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Navigation component for switching between views
components.usage: Page sections, settings panels, navigation sidebars

accessibility.keyboard: Arrow keys to navigate, Enter/Space to select

components.name: Table
components.description: Data table with sorting, filtering, pagination, and selection

behavior.sorting: Click column headers to sort asc/desc
behavior.selection: Checkbox in first column for row selection

components.usage: Data lists, admin panels, reports, settings tables

components.name: StatCard
components.description: Dashboard metric card with value, label, and trend indicator
components.usage: Dashboard metrics, KPI displays, analytics summaries

components.name: SearchInput
components.description: Search input with clear button and loading state
components.usage: Table search, global search, filter inputs

components.name: SplitButton
components.description: Button with primary action and dropdown for secondary actions

behavior.primaryAction: Clicking main button triggers primary action
behavior.keyboard: Arrow keys navigate dropdown, Escape closes

components.usage: Save with options, export formats, action variations

components.name: Card
components.description: Container component for grouped content with optional header and footer
components.usage: Content grouping, settings panels, dashboard widgets

components.name: Spinner
components.description: Loading indicator for async operations
components.usage: Button loading, page loading, async operations

components.name: Divider
components.description: Visual separator for sections
components.usage: Section separators, form dividers, OR separators

components.name: List
components.description: Ordered or unordered list container with item components
components.usage: Feature lists, navigation menus, content lists

components.name: DropdownMenu
components.description: Context menu with action items and optional icons

behavior.dismiss: Click outside or Escape to close
behavior.keyboard: Arrow keys to navigate, Enter to select

components.usage: More actions menu, context menus, user menus

components.name: Toggle
components.description: Binary on/off toggle switch for settings
components.usage: Settings toggles, feature flags, boolean preferences

components.name: DatePicker
components.description: Calendar-based date selection with dropdown
components.usage: Date selection, scheduling, filters

components.name: TimePicker
components.description: Time selection dropdown with configurable intervals

behavior.dropdown: Shows scrollable list of time slots
behavior.format: Displays 12h or 24h based on use24Hour prop
behavior.keyboard: Arrow keys to navigate, Enter to select

components.usage: Time selection, scheduling, appointments

components.name: MultiSelect
components.description: Multi-selection dropdown with search and tags

behavior.tags: Selected items shown as removable tags
behavior.search: Filter options by typing in search box
behavior.keyboard: Arrow keys navigate, Space toggles, Escape closes

components.usage: Multi-selection filters, tag inputs, category selection

compositions.name: ChatInput
compositions.description: Composed input area for chat with attachment and send

compositions.name: ChatHeader
compositions.description: Header with model selector, mode switcher, and clear button

compositions.name: AIMessage
compositions.description: AI message bubble with markdown and collapsible sections
